name: Q2239470
abstract: Placide Adams Jr. (August 30, 1929 – March 29, 2003) was an American jazz double bassist, who worked prolifically with a wide circle of New Orleans jazz stars over his 50-year career.

about_quotes.speaker: Kidd Jordan
about_quotes.evidence: Justin Adams, Placide Adams, and Mama Dolly Adams, and another brother, they come out of a traditional band setting but in the fifties they was playing modern jazz.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kidd Jordan interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 24, 2006
